{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Storm Lotus
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Storm Lotus]] is one of [[Lindon]]'s [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
